name: code-contract
description: Keep a rewrite/migration honest: freeze an owner-to-code product contract, audit parity against it, and gate fixes with independent verification — three skills on one stable atom-ID spine.

plugins.name: code-contract
plugins.description: Three composing Claude Code skills — product-contract (freeze the spec), parity-audit (find gaps with file-line evidence), verified-execution (close them behind an independent gate) — sharing one stable atom-ID.
